items.title: Penelope Isles – “I Loved You, Robert Pattinson”
items.summary: What a year for Robert Pattinson! I thought he was sensational as a wormy little fuck in The Drama, and we're a few days away from seeing him as Antinous in The Odyssey. Later in the year, he'll pop up in Dune: Part Three, and he'll also play Chris Hansen, alongside a debuting Phoebe Bridgers, in Primetime.
items.audio: audio/Penelope Isles _ _I Loved You_ Robert Pattinson.mp3

items.title: Deep Sea Diver – “Teardrop” (Massive Attack Cover)
items.summary: You might think of Massive Attack's glimmering, perfect 1998 song "Teardrop" as the lead single from their classic album Mezzanine or as the theme of the TV show House. I think of "Teardrop" as the song that was playing on my Walkman headphones during a moment that's always somewhere near the top layer of my memory. The post Deep Sea Diver – “Teardrop” (Massive Attack Cover) appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Beabadoobee – “Switchblade”
items.summary: Beabadoobee's new album is set up to be a big deal. In March, Beatrice Laus returned with "All I Did Was Dream Of You," a new collaboration with the Marías that served as a non-album appetizer for her new era.

items.title: Twin Temple announce new album, talk being dropped from Charley Crockett’s tour for being too satanic
items.summary: The “Satanic doo wop” duo will release ‘Doomed Lovers’ on October 9 and they’ll be on tour with Satan-friendly Danzig in September.

items.title: Every Jay-Z Album, Ranked
items.summary: You may know him as Shawn Carter, Jay-Z, Hova, or simply one of the best rappers alive. Born in New York in 1969, Jay-Z spent his early adulthood on the wrong side of the law, making good money in the illicit drug trade but watching with envy as other Brooklyn rappers of his generation like […]
